title: RDMover
description: Small mod allowing you to transfer items directly from RefinedStorage's disks to StorageDrawers's drawers with a right mouse click
body:
This is a small mod I made, to make your life a little bit easier. You can transfer items directly from RefinedStorage's disks to StorageDrawers's drawers with a right mouse click.

<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/eYGuV0T2esk?wmode=transparent" height="358" width="638"></iframe>

Modpack usage allowance: you can use my mod as long as you notify me (I really would like to see, what you created).
